setPassword.title: Set Password
setPassword.description: Please set a new password for your account.
setPassword.error: Failed to set password. Please try again.

passwordConfirmation.title: Confirm Password
passwordConfirmation.description: Please confirm your password to continue.

mfaQr.description: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app. To enter it manually, use the following code:
mfaQr.title: MFA Setup
mfaQr.manualInputNote: If you can't scan the QR code, enter the code manually.

mfaVerify.title: Verify Multi-Factor Authentication
mfaVerify.description: Enter the code generated by your authenticator app.

mfaBackupCodes.title: MFA Backup Codes
mfaBackupCodes.description: Save the following backup codes in a safe place. You can use them to access your account if you can't access your MFA device.
mfaBackupCodes.warning: Note: These codes are shown only once. Save them securely for future reference.

mfaDisable.title: Disable Multi-Factor Authentication
mfaDisable.description: Disabling MFA reduces your account security. Are you sure you want to disable it?
mfaDisable.warning: Warning: This action will reduce your account security.
mfaDisable.note: After disabling, MFA will no longer be required, increasing the risk of unauthorized access.

emailChange.title: Change Email Address
emailChange.description: Enter your new email address. For confirmation, your current password is required.
emailChange.emailChangeSent: We've sent a confirmation email to change your address. Please check your inbox.
emailChange.emailChangeError: Failed to change email address. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Change Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your current password and set a new one.
resetPassword.error: Failed to change password. Please try again.

passkeySetup.title: Setup Passkey
passkeySetup.description: Register a passkey to your account.
passkeySetup.description2: You can use your device's biometrics or security key to sign in.
passkeySetup.registerSuccessDescription: Your passkey has been successfully registered.
passkeySetup.registerErrorDescription: Failed to register passkey. Please try again.

passkeyDelete.title: Delete Passkey
passkeyDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey? This action cannot be undone.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Consent
cookieConsent.description1: We use cookies to enhance your experience on our site.
cookieConsent.description2: By continuing to use our site, you agree to our use of cookies.
cookieConsent.description3_prefix: You can manage your cookie preferences in the

commandPalette.description: Navigate to different places around the site
commandPalette.title: Command Palette
